options.label: A
options.text: The total amount of force acting on an object

options.label: B
options.text: The force acting per unit area

options.label: C
options.text: The weight of an object divided by its volume

options.label: D
options.text: The speed at which a force is applied

explanation: Pressure is defined as the force applied spread over a certain area. The smaller the area a force is spread over, the greater the pressure.
